text: I feel a sense of curiosity and gentle anticipation. The sterile glass and utilitarian walls invite a reflective mood, while the bold display inside, marked R+D, hints at spaces of intellectual and creative engagement. It feels like a threshold—a transition from the mundane functional world into one of ideas, experiment, and possibility. My presence here feels both small and meaningful, as if I am about to participate in a process of discovery alongside others who value growth and inquiry.
